headline: Yoga Practice
description: Yoga is an ancient physical, mental, and spiritual practice originating in India (5000+ years). Modern yoga in the West focuses on: asanas (postures), pranayama (breathing), meditation. Styles: Hatha (gentle, foundational), Vinyasa (flow, breath-linked movement), Ashtanga (vigorous, set sequence), Iyengar (alignment-focused), Yin (long-held passive poses).
